title: Shlecho newt
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A [[Yuuzhan Vong]] bioengineered creature, the '''shlecho newt''' was a small brown-orange amphibian. [[Coomb spore]]s were a favorite food of such creatures and as such, could detect their presence on another being. As a sign of excitement, the newt would dart its tongue in and out and its head would become a shade of crimson. This was used on [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] to detect the coomb spores within her.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
